svg.aria-label: Kfar Saba Safe Access static map preview. Red circles mark top review candidates (score 70 and above); blue diamonds mark pedestrian generators; green squares mark mapped crossings. Larger markers indicate higher review-priority scores.
svg.text: Kfar Saba Safe Access Route-Aware Review Candidates
Blue diamonds = pedestrian generators; red circles = top review candidates (score 70+).
Green squares = mapped crossings. Larger circles indicate higher review-priority scores.
